child_page.label: Shafi
child_page.description: Ƙirƙiri shafi na ƙasa a cikin wannan shafi.

link_to_page.label: Hadi zuwa shafi
link_to_page.description: Haɗi zuwa wani shafi da ke akwai.

toggle_heading_1.label: Take 1 mai jujjuya
toggle_heading_1.description: Babban kan labari mai iya ɓoye abubuwan da ke ciki.

toggle_heading_2.label: Take 2 mai jujjuya
toggle_heading_2.description: Take matsakaici mai iya ɓoye abubuwan ciki.

toggle_heading_3.label: Take 3 mai jujjuya
toggle_heading_3.description: Take ƙarami mai iya ɓoye abubuwan ciki.

toggle_heading_4.label: Juya taken 4
toggle_heading_4.description: Takaitaccen take mai iya ɓoye abubuwan ciki.

to_do.label: Jerin ayyuka
to_do.description: Diddigi ayyuka tare da akwatin rajista.

toggle.label: Jerin juya
toggle.description: Juya na iya ɓoye da nuna abubuwa.

table_of_contents.label: Teburin abubuwa
table_of_contents.description: Nuna hanyoyin haɗi zuwa kanun labarai a wannan shafi.

synced_block.label: Tubali mai aiki tare

button.label: Maɓalli
button.description: Saka abu mai sake amfani da danni ɗaya.

tab.label: Shafuka
tab.description: Haɗa abun ciki a cikin shafuka masu suna.

action_move_to.label: Matsar zuwa
action_move_to.description: Matsar da wannan block zuwa wani shafi.

action_color.label: Launi
action_color.description: Canza rubutu ko launin bango na wannan block.

simple_table.label: Tebur
simple_table.description: Ƙara tebur mai sauƙi a wannan shafi.

image.label: Hoto
image.description: Loda ko shigar da hanyar haɗi.

bookmark.label: Alamar shafi
bookmark.description: Ajiye hanyar yanar gizo a matsayin kati.

file.label: Fayil
file.description: Haɗa linkin fayil zuwa wannan shafi.
